# Boundary Conditions for Success or Failure

Manufactured traction is more likely to work when:

- the item is near a rank/candidate/badge threshold;
- the platform uses behavioural proxies;
- feedback loops are strong;
- early uncertainty is high;
- visible popularity influences users;
- detection/dampening is weak;
- the campaign creates cross-signal consistency.

It is less likely to work when:

- the platform discounts suspicious activity;
- quality signals dominate fake proxy signals;
- conversion signals are audited;
- there are strong disclosure rules;
- the tactic creates obvious cross-signal inconsistency.
